story: As an Active Recorder, I want to use a built-in calculator when entering monetary amounts, so that I can compute totals or perform on-the-fly math without leaving the app.
acceptance_criteria: A calculator is accessible from the amount entry field.
The calculator supports basic mathematical operations (+, -, *, /, %). The % operator should calculate the 'percentage of' (A % B = A * B / 100).
Calculated values can be directly saved to the entry field.
